name: dashboard
description: Build a multi-component dashboard with data fetching, charts, and responsive layout.
prompt:
Build a dashboard application with the following features:
1. A header with the app title and a dark/light mode toggle
2. A sidebar with navigation links (Dashboard, Analytics, Settings)
3. A main content area with:
   a. A stats row showing 4 metric cards (Total Users, Revenue, Orders, Conversion Rate) with fake data
   b. A line chart showing monthly revenue data (use canvas or SVG, no external chart library)
   c. A table showing recent orders (5-10 rows) with columns: Order ID, Customer, Amount, Status, Date
   d. Status badges (Completed=green, Pending=yellow, Cancelled=red)
4. Responsive layout: sidebar collapses on mobile
5. The dark/light mode toggle should actually switch themes
6. Data should be loaded from a mock data source (can be inline JSON)

Build this as a multi-component application with good component decomposition.
acceptanceCriteria: Header renders with title and theme toggle
Orders table shows rows with data
Theme toggle switches between light and dark modes
Layout is responsive (sidebar behavior changes at mobile widths)
